form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished sixth on April 3 over 488m at Mandurah behind Myles Keeping, beaten 5 lengths (28.08) in a Grade 5. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Placed last time (29.94) at this track in a Grade 5/6, finishing third and beaten 4.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from nine starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.
